name: street-art-agent
description: Researches a city's street art scene via streetartcities.com, analyzes the visual DNA (colors, techniques, themes), and generates 3 advertising campaign concepts inspired by the local graffiti culture — complete with AI-generated abstract street art imagery.

toolSurfaces.name: anthropic-api
toolSurfaces.description: Claude Sonnet with web search for street art research and campaign ideation

toolSurfaces.name: stable-horde
toolSurfaces.description: Free decentralized AI image generation for abstract street art visuals

toolSurfaces.name: streetartcities
toolSurfaces.description: Primary source for city-specific street art and graffiti references
